$comment: Tracking areas for work item routing. Each area maps to an AZ DevOps area path and is handled by a personality. The handled_by field is the single source of truth for which personality owns which tracking area.

areas.name: Workstream-2
areas.description: Example tracking area under Ops. Replace with your actual tracked category (e.g., Career, LinkedIn, Personal).

areas.name: Workstream-3
areas.description: Example tracking area nested under Workstream-1. Shows nested area paths and folder mirroring.
